news.title:
BASF focuses on fine chemicals, leveraging tech and regulatory expertise to target pharma and supply chain needs.
Stock up 19.5% YTD; investors monitor partnerships, acquisitions, and fine chemicals' role in high-margin growth.
news.summary:
BASF focuses on fine chemicals, leveraging tech and regulatory expertise to target pharma and supply chain needs.
Stock up 19.5% YTD; investors monitor partnerships, acquisitions, and fine chemicals' role in high-margin growth.

news.title:
BASF India upgraded from Sell to Hold as valuation metrics improve.
Enhanced P/E and P/BV ratios make BASF India more attractive despite market challenges.
news.summary:
BASF India upgraded from Sell to Hold as valuation metrics improve.
Enhanced P/E and P/BV ratios make BASF India more attractive despite market challenges.

news.title:
BASF completes Noble Seeds acquisition, expanding its vegetable seeds business in India.
Noble Seeds is now a wholly owned subsidiary of Nunhems India, part of BASF Nunhems.
news.summary:
BASF completes Noble Seeds acquisition, expanding its vegetable seeds business in India.
Noble Seeds is now a wholly owned subsidiary of Nunhems India, part of BASF Nunhems.

news.title:
BASF India Ltd to sell 100% stake in BASF India Coatings Pvt Ltd for INR 230.2 crore.
Transaction with Carlyle Group firms set to close in Q2 2026; subsidiary contributed 3.1% to revenue in FY25.
news.summary:
BASF India Ltd to sell 100% stake in BASF India Coatings Pvt Ltd for INR 230.2 crore.
Transaction with Carlyle Group firms set to close in Q2 2026; subsidiary contributed 3.1% to revenue in FY25.

news.title:
BASF Pharma Solutions announces global price adjustment for excipients and APIs.
The price adjustment aims to support reliability and quality of offerings.
news.summary:
BASF Pharma Solutions announces global price adjustment for excipients and APIs.
The price adjustment aims to support reliability and quality of offerings.

news.title:
BASF raises prices in Europe by up to 30% due to rising costs.
Price hikes affect home care, cleaning, and industrial formulator businesses.
news.summary:
BASF raises prices in Europe by up to 30% due to rising costs.
Price hikes affect home care, cleaning, and industrial formulator businesses.

news.title:
BASF plans price hikes for additives in plastic applications.
Focus is on antioxidant process stabilizers and light stabilizers.
news.summary:
BASF plans price hikes for additives in plastic applications.
Focus is on antioxidant process stabilizers and light stabilizers.

news.title:
BASF SE plans job cuts to reduce costs amid tough chemicals market conditions.
Its internal IT division, with 8,500 employees, will face significant workforce reductions.
news.summary:
BASF SE plans job cuts to reduce costs amid tough chemicals market conditions.
Its internal IT division, with 8,500 employees, will face significant workforce reductions.

news.title: BASF India reported Q3 consolidated net profit of ₹1.05B, unchanged YoY.
news.summary: BASF India reported Q3 consolidated net profit of ₹1.05B, unchanged YoY.

news.title:
BASF India board approves expansion of dispersions production at Mangalore.
New line targets architectural paints, construction chemicals, and paper; startup by end-2027.
news.summary:
BASF India board approves expansion of dispersions production at Mangalore.
New line targets architectural paints, construction chemicals, and paper; startup by end-2027.

news.title:
BASF India surged 7.4% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 3,903.3 intraday.
The stock outperformed peers and reversed a 3-day downward trend.
news.summary:
BASF India surged 7.4% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 3,903.3 intraday.
The stock outperformed peers and reversed a 3-day downward trend.

news.title:
BASF expands polyisobutylene capacity, focusing on energy-efficient specialty chemicals for construction and textiles.
Trading at ₹48.18, BASF shows 7.2% 30-day gain; Simply Wall St sees it as undervalued by 49.6%.
news.summary:
BASF expands polyisobutylene capacity, focusing on energy-efficient specialty chemicals for construction and textiles.
Trading at ₹48.18, BASF shows 7.2% 30-day gain; Simply Wall St sees it as undervalued by 49.6%.

news.title:
BASF India Ltd received BSE's no-objection letter for its Agricultural Solutions demerger.
The scheme involves BASF India and its subsidiary BASF Agricultural Solutions India. Approval pending regulatory clearances.
news.summary:
BASF India Ltd received BSE's no-objection letter for its Agricultural Solutions demerger.
The scheme involves BASF India and its subsidiary BASF Agricultural Solutions India. Approval pending regulatory clearances.

news.title:
BASF India Ltd to hold board meeting on 13th Feb 2026 to review unaudited results for Q3 FY2025.
The meeting will discuss standalone and consolidated financial results per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
BASF India Ltd to hold board meeting on 13th Feb 2026 to review unaudited results for Q3 FY2025.
The meeting will discuss standalone and consolidated financial results per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
BASF's Nunhems India to acquire Noble Seeds, an Indian vegetable seed firm.
The deal amount remains undisclosed and is expected to close soon.
news.summary:
BASF's Nunhems India to acquire Noble Seeds, an Indian vegetable seed firm.
The deal amount remains undisclosed and is expected to close soon.

news.title:
BASF India Ltd held an Analyst & Fund Managers Meet, sharing updates on financials and operations for Q2 and H1 FY25-26.
Key highlights included a 4% dip in H1 sales, 27% PBT drop, robust safety performance, and focus on operational efficiencies, inventory, and receivables.
news.summary:
BASF India Ltd held an Analyst & Fund Managers Meet, sharing updates on financials and operations for Q2 and H1 FY25-26.
Key highlights included a 4% dip in H1 sales, 27% PBT drop, robust safety performance, and focus on operational efficiencies, inventory, and receivables.

news.title:
RCF Q2 profit rose 33.4% YoY to ₹105.4 crore; revenue grew 23.4% YoY to ₹5,292 crore.
EBITDA stood at ₹201 crore, margins dipped to 4.1% from 4.7%. Shares closed at ₹150.50, down 0.97%.
news.summary:
RCF Q2 profit rose 33.4% YoY to ₹105.4 crore; revenue grew 23.4% YoY to ₹5,292 crore.
EBITDA stood at ₹201 crore, margins dipped to 4.1% from 4.7%. Shares closed at ₹150.50, down 0.97%.

news.title:
BASF India Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹1.54B from ₹2.09B YoY.
Q2 EBITDA margin declines to 3.9% from 4.73% YoY.
news.summary:
BASF India Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹1.54B from ₹2.09B YoY.
Q2 EBITDA margin declines to 3.9% from 4.73% YoY.

news.title:
BASF India Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 and H1 2025, approved by its board on Nov 14, 2025.
BASF India finalized acquisition of BASF Agricultural Solutions India Ltd and plans renewable energy procurement via Clean Max Amalfi Pvt Ltd.
news.summary:
BASF India Ltd reported unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 and H1 2025, approved by its board on Nov 14, 2025.
BASF India finalized acquisition of BASF Agricultural Solutions India Ltd and plans renewable energy procurement via Clean Max Amalfi Pvt Ltd.
